new.name: HackTheBox-Silentium
new.description: Full walkthrough of HackTheBox "Silentium" (Medium/Linux). Chains three CVEs: CVE-2025-58434 leaks a Flowise password reset token unauthenticated, enabling account takeover; CVE-2025-59528 achieves RCE via unsanitized CustomMCP node; env vars expose SSH credentials for lateral movement. CVE-2025-8110 exploits Gogs symlink write as root to escalate.
